meta.source: NQ.c.0 (Nasdaq 100 futures, 2016-04-20…2024-12-31) + YM (E-mini Dow Jones, SMT partner)

variants.be_50: MFE>=50% TP-dist arms BE; bar touching entry exits flat
variants.tp1_be: MFE>=50% closes half at +50% TP-dist AND moves stop to BE on remainder

smt.true: YM took its OPPOSITE-side pre-news liquidity (NQ short → YM low<pre_low; NQ long → YM high>pre_high)
